title: TERRA [Wild Adventures]
description: A Minecraft modpack designed for realism and adventure, featuring custom world generation, immersive dungeons, new mobs, weather and catastrophes, along with enhanced sounds and visuals.
body:
# Terra [Wild Adventures]
- 100+ mods
- Minecraft Forge 1.20.1
- Main goal: Realism and Exploration
- Possible to run on server
- A ton of world generation mods
- Many quality of life mods
- Plenty of visual mods
- New mobs and bosses

## Something to read
Terra transforms the Minecraft experience by focusing on immersive exploration and adventure, while staying close to the vanilla feel. Journey through enhanced overworlds, Nether, and End, with new mobs, dungeons, and custom world generation that invites endless discovery. Experience realism with custom sounds, resource packs, and environmental challenges like weather and catastrophes. With minimal new items, the focus remains on pure adventure and survival, ensuring a immersive experience in every corner of your world.

## Tipps and fixes
- If you run the Modpack allocate more ram or else it will crash (can not run with 2GB of ram)
- Hide your minimap with Ctrl + J or show full map with J. Press # to change format.
- Watch out at night
- Press R or U on an item to show what to do with it
- Swim speed is default 0 so set to 1 with /attribute @s neoforge:swim_speed base set 1

## Run on a server and play with friends
- Get the forge installer and install the server files
- Run a bat script like that (watch out for location where you installed java and if you have the right forge version or change 1.20.1-47.3.0 to your version) and accept the eula. Then run again.
```
@echo off
"C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17.0.1\bin\java.exe" -Xms12G -Xmx16G @libraries/net/minecraftforge/forge/1.20.1-47.3.0/win_args.txt %*
pause
```
- Copy all mods in the modpack in the server mods folder but REMOVE (embeddium, embeddiumplus, Fog, oculus, sounds, distanthorizons (below version 2.3)) as they crash the server
- Get something like ngrok or playit.gg to open a tunnel and host the server from your pc
- Reduce ram usage by pregenerating the world with e.g. chunky mod on the server or use performance enhancing mods

## Mods used in this project (1.20.1):
projectvibrantjourneys-1.20.1-6.0.0.jar: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-vibrant-journeys](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-vibrant-journeys)

Aquaculture-1.20.1-2.5.1.jar: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture by Shadow

SpelunkersCharm-3.5.4-1.20.1.jar: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkers-charm-ii by LuckyOwl

gravestone-1.20.1-1.0.10.jar: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod by henkelmax

mcw-bridges-2.1.1-mc1.20.1forge.jar: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges by sketch_macaw

Enhanced Audio r6.zip: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enhanced-audio by Frawzy

born_in_chaos_[Forge]1.20.1_1.2.jar: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos by mongoose_artist

THT-1.20.1-6.1.1.jar: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tans-huge-trees by TannyJung

Bliss-Shader-main.zip: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bliss-shader by Xonk___ (DH compatible version) https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader by X0nk

fantasyfauna-1.20.1-0.3.3BETA.jar: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fantasy-fauna by ExoWarlock9031

Enhanced Audio Ambience r1.zip: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enhanced-audio-ambience

colourful containers.zip: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui-optifine
